name: Revised Cardiac Risk Index (RCRI)
relevantDrugClasses: Broad application: Cardiovascular, Antiplatelet, Endocrine, GI, Pulmonary, Pain, and other medication classes
notes: Estimates risk of major cardiac events after non-cardiac surgery; guides perioperative cardiac workup

name: CHA₂DS₂-VASc Score for Atrial Fibrillation Stroke Risk
notes: Guides anticoagulation decisions in patients with atrial fibrillation

name: HAS-BLED Bleeding Risk Score
notes: Estimates major bleeding risk on anticoagulation; informs perioperative bridging decisions

name: ACS NSQIP Surgical Risk Calculator
relevantDrugClasses: Antiplatelet Agents; Cancer Medications; Cardiovascular Medications
notes: Estimates 30-day postoperative complication and mortality risk across surgical specialties

name: Surgical Outcome Risk Tool v2 (SORT)
relevantDrugClasses: Broad application across perioperative medication classes
notes: Uses information about patient health and the planned surgical procedure to provide an estimate of the risk of death within 30 days of an operation

name: QTc Interval Calculator (Bazett / Fridericia / Framingham)
relevantDrugClasses: Antiarrhythmics (amiodarone, dronedarone, flecainide, propafenone); Antipsychotics; Anticholinergic bladder agents
notes: Corrects QT interval for heart rate; essential for identifying QT-prolonging medication risk perioperatively

name: eGFR / CrCl Calculator (Cockcroft-Gault Equation)
relevantDrugClasses: Anticoagulants (DOACs — dabigatran, apixaban, rivaroxaban, edoxaban; LMWH; fondaparinux); Diuretics; Lithium
notes: Used to calculate DOAC and LMWH hold duration based on renal function; preferred for drug dosing

name: eGFR Calculator (CKD-EPI Equation)
notes: CKD-EPI preferred for assessing renal function and SGLT2 inhibitor eligibility/safety

name: Caprini VTE Risk Score
relevantDrugClasses: Oral Contraceptives; Estrogen / Hormone Therapy; SERMs; Aromatase Inhibitors; Gender-Affirming Hormones; Post-Menopausal HRT
notes: Stratifies VTE risk in surgical patients; guides prophylaxis decisions for patients on thrombogenic medications

name: Perioperative Steroid Conversion / Supplementation Calculator
notes: Converts between steroid agents using equipotency ratios; supports stress-dose steroid supplementation planning

name: Preoperative Anaemia Assessment – Iron Deficiency Replacement Calculator
relevantDrugClasses: Iron Supplements (ferrous gluconate, ferrous sulfate, ferrous fumarate, polysaccharide iron, heme iron polypeptide)
notes: Calculates oral iron replacement dose for preoperative anaemia optimisation (patient blood management)

name: Benzodiazepine Conversion Calculator
relevantDrugClasses: Benzodiazepines (all classes: short, intermediate, long-acting); Z-drugs (zopiclone, zolpidem, eszopiclone)
notes: Converts between oral benzodiazepine agents using equipotency ratios for perioperative management

name: Opioid Equianalgesic / Opiate Conversion Calculator
relevantDrugClasses: Chronic Opioids (codeine, fentanyl, hydromorphone, morphine, oxycodone, tapentadol, tramadol, methadone, meperidine, diacetylmorphine); Buprenorphine
notes: Converts between opioid agents and routes using equianalgesic ratios; essential for perioperative pain planning

name: COWS Score for Opioid Withdrawal
notes: Quantifies severity of opioid withdrawal; guides perioperative opioid management in patients on OAT

name: AUDIT-C Alcohol Use Screening Tool
notes: 3-item screen for hazardous or harmful alcohol use; relevant to alcohol use disorder medication management

name: Cannabis Use Disorder Identification Test (CUDIT-R)
notes: 8-item validated screen for cannabis use disorder in perioperative patients
